title: Paid Adapter Reconciliation Entry
description: Schema for a reconciliation row produced by PaidReconciliationService after an execute() response. Records estimated vs actual spend, links to sponsor/campaign, and tracks discrepancy. See PAID-04.

reconciliation_id.description: Unique identifier for this reconciliation row. Use prefix rec_.

manifest_id.description: References the manifest_id from the originating execute response.

idempotency_key.description: Idempotency key from the manifest meta. Used to deduplicate reconciliation writes.

sponsor_id.description: Sponsor this spend is attributed to.

campaign_id.description: Ad platform campaign ID or internal campaign identifier.

estimated_spend.description: Total estimated spend from the dry_run response.

actual_spend.description: Total actual spend from the execute response.

operation_ids_on_channel.description: List of operation_id_on_channel values from the execute response for audit.

status.description: pending: not yet matched; reconciled: spend confirmed; discrepancy: delta above threshold; error: reconciliation failed.

partial_failure.description: True when the execute response status was partial_success.

notes.description: Operator notes or automated reconciliation commentary.
